ksa_text: Knowledge of AI system documentation standards including model cards, system cards, datasheets for datasets, and evaluation evidence standards required for regulatory conformity assessment.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ensure that AI design and development activities are properly documented and updated.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Ensure that AI design and development activities are properly documented and updated.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge case — included on balance: knowledge carries governance/compliance signals ("regulat  :ory|ion|ions|e|ed|ing|or|ors", "conformit  :y|ies|ance") in Risk Management context (affinity 0.60). Composite strong (0.5375). A AIMS Manager would encounter this competency in regulatory program work.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation strong: 3 job-posting-level and 2 framework/certification matches (EU AI Act, ISO 42001, NIST AI RMF, CIPP/E, CRISC). Competency appears regularly in AI compliance and regulatory affairs role descriptions.
